title: Refactor auth system with session-based approach
description: Create a src/auth/ module with sessionStore.ts (in-memory session store with TTL, get/set/delete/cleanup), authMiddleware.ts (validate session tokens from Authorization header), authController.ts (login/logout/me), authRoutes.ts (POST /auth/login, POST /auth/logout, GET /auth/me). Add comprehensive tests for each module, register auth routes in the app, and create a migration script documenting the migration steps.
